scripts.build: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/i18n run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/lsp run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/app run build && pnpm --filter ./packages/cli run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run test && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/i18n run test && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/app run test && pnpm --filter ./packages/cli run test && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/lsp run test && pnpm --filter karasu-vscode run test && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/docs-site run test && pnpm run test:scripts
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/i18n run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/app run test:coverage && pnpm --filter ./packages/cli run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/docs-site run test:coverage && pnpm run test:scripts
scripts.check:cycles: madge --circular --extensions ts,tsx packages/core/src packages/i18n/src packages/app/src packages/cli/src packages/lsp/src packages/vscode/src
